description: OpenHands skill-writer-agent step 2 workflow JSON output.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const statuses = ['resolved','conflict-resolved','needs-review']; data.version === '1' && data.metadata && Number.isInteger(data.metadata.decision_count) && data.metadata.decision_count > 0 && Number.isInteger(data.metadata.conflicts_resolved) && data.metadata.round === 1 && Array.isArray(data.decisions) && data.decisions.length === data.metadata.decision_count && data.decisions.every((d) => typeof d.id === 'string' && typeof d.title === 'string' && typeof d.original_question === 'string' && typeof d.decision === 'string' && typeof d.implication === 'string' && statuses.includes(d.status))
